name: acid_11_batched_fact_rule_retract_mix
utterances: Yara is a parent of Zed, Zed is a parent of Abel, and Abel is a parent of Bex.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y, and if X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
Actually retract these: parent(zed, abel) and parent(abel, bex).
Zed is a parent of Arlo.
Arlo is a parent of Bex.
Explain briefly why deterministic rollback helps.
